name: @ynx/calendar
description: Independent native-first YNX Calendar product and service

scripts.test: npm run localize:native && node --check web/app.js && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.build: go build -ldflags "-X main.buildCommit=$(git rev-parse HEAD) -X main.buildRelease=ynx-calendar-0.2.0-testnet-preview -X main.buildTime=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" -o /tmp/ynx-calendard .
